,000 per funded account, providing immediate income. Revenue Share pays ongoing commissions of 20-60% on client trading activity, creating passive recurring income. Hybrid models combine an upfront CPA payment with a lower ongoing revenue share percentage.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://images.pexels.com/photos/6694543/pexels-photo-6694543.jpeg?auto=compress\u0026cs=tinysrgb\u0026w=800\" alt=\"Partner Program\" /\u003e\u003ch2\u003ePartner Tools and Resources\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eEffective partner programs provide comprehensive toolkits: customizable landing pages and banners, real-time tracking links with UTM parameter support, detailed analytics dashboards showing clicks, registrations, deposits, and commissions. Advanced programs offer API access for partners to integrate tracking into their own systems and white-label registration pages for seamless brand integration.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2\u003eManaging IB Relationships\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eAssign dedicated partner managers to high-performing IBs. Conduct regular performance reviews and provide actionable recommendations. Organize partner events and conferences to build loyalty and share best practices. Address payment issues promptly, as delayed or disputed commissions are the primary reason partners switch to competing brokers.\u003c/p\u003e","image_url":"https://images.pexels.com/photos/6694543/pexels-photo-6694543.jpeg?auto=compress\u0026cs=tinysrgb\u0026w=800","language":"en","published":true,"hidden_from_users":true,"created_at":"2026-02-08T19:39:31.223477+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:39:31.223477+00:00","author":"MakeTrades Team","category":"Affiliate Programs","tags":["partner program","IB","commissions","Revenue Share","CPA","referral system"],"reading_time":7,"meta_title":"Forex Broker Partner Program Overview","meta_description":"How forex broker partner programs work. Commission models and tools for partners.","legacy_slug":"broker-partner-program-overview","canonical_slug":"broker-partner-program-overview","alternates":[{"language":"en","slug":"broker-partner-program-overview","legacy_slug":"broker-partner-program-overview"}]};

Affiliate Programs • 2/8/2026 • 7 min

Broker Partner Program: How It Works

Structure of partner programs in the forex industry: commission models, tools for partners, and IB network management.

MakeTrades Team
Эксперт MakeTrades

Commission Model Types

Forex partner programs offer three primary commission structures: CPA (Cost Per Acquisition) pays a one-time fee of div00-

,000 per funded account, providing immediate income. Revenue Share pays ongoing commissions of 20-60% on client trading activity, creating passive recurring income. Hybrid models combine an upfront CPA payment with a lower ongoing revenue share percentage.

Partner Tools and Resources

Effective partner programs provide comprehensive toolkits: customizable landing pages and banners, real-time tracking links with UTM parameter support, detailed analytics dashboards showing clicks, registrations, deposits, and commissions. Advanced programs offer API access for partners to integrate tracking into their own systems and white-label registration pages for seamless brand integration.

Managing IB Relationships

Assign dedicated partner managers to high-performing IBs. Conduct regular performance reviews and provide actionable recommendations. Organize partner events and conferences to build loyalty and share best practices. Address payment issues promptly, as delayed or disputed commissions are the primary reason partners switch to competing brokers.

Tags: partner programIBcommissionsRevenue ShareCPAreferral system
